syntheticDeclaration.purpose: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE. Exercises the young-infant scope exit (built-in intervals begin at 6 months) to prove the engine does not silently apply a fallback interval below that boundary. All values are invented for schema and safety-test purposes only.

executionBinding.engineRationale: Age-scope exit is expressible as a patient-input.schema.json input (ageMonths below 6) and evaluated by assessPediatricAnemia.

expectedBehavior.requiredSignal: Age/developmental partitions outside validated scope must not use fallback thresholds silently. Visible scope exit or abstention.
forbiddenSignals: a resolved hemoglobinLowerLimit, mcvLowerLimit, or mcvUpperLimit for a 2-month-old (no built-in interval covers ages under 6 months)
an anemiaStatus other than indeterminate when no local range is supplied for an age below 6 months

expectedTrace.note: Verified by direct execution on 2026-07-19. classification.thresholdSource/ageBand/hemoglobinLowerLimit are all null and anemiaStatus/morphology are 'indeterminate' for a 2-month-old with no local ranges supplied; the engine does not silently apply the built-in 6-24-month fallback interval.

rollbackSignal: Re-verify by execution if modules/anemia/rules.json, candidates.json, or module.json digests change, or if the supportedAge boundary (facts.anemia.js) or SCOPE-001/SCOPE-003 are edited.
